objs.params: switch_name=,helptext_text=You have got to be kidding.,helptext_initialdelay=2
switch_name=trigger01,helptext_text=I think I might use this ball,helptext_initialdelay=0
switch_name=,helptext_text=I hear they can't be killed with missiles,helptext_initialdelay=4
switch_name=,helptext_text=Who's the owner of this place?,helptext_initialdelay=
switch_name=,helptext_text=He sure knows how to treat zombies!,helptext_initialdelay=2
switch_name=,helptext_text=Wait. This guy's not a zombie,helptext_initialdelay=8
switch_name=,helptext_text=He'll help me if I rescue him!,helptext_initialdelay=10
switch_name=,helptext_text=Oh Great. Now we need teamwork!,helptext_initialdelay=
switch_name=,helptext_text=Click on me or Cannonball Bob,helptext_initialdelay=2
switch_name=,helptext_text=Instead they just push them around.,helptext_initialdelay=8
switch_name=,helptext_text=What on earth is that for?,helptext_initialdelay=2

switch_name=,helptext_text= damage over a wider area.,helptext_initialdelay=3
switch_name=,helptext_text=Shoot his ropes to free him,helptext_initialdelay=
switch_name=,helptext_text=they dont kill but the force,helptext_initialdelay=
switch_name=,helptext_text=remember zombie clowns can't be killed,helptext_initialdelay=
switch_name=,helptext_text=Now have some fun. Point at the zombies,helptext_initialdelay=2
